title: The Ark Maxim Is Revealed
description: Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.
scene: Across pages 12, 13, 14, 15, this scene centers on Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Gan Fall, Wyper. Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Is that part of the trial!?

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: I'm just a little pissed off!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: You may not go to God's shrine!!

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Hold on! Where exactly are we going!?

summary: Sanji and Usopp risk themselves against Enel’s overwhelming power, buying time even when victory seems impossible.
